zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Belgrave於1508年5月15日出生在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德時，他的父親John Belgrave19歲，母親Johanna Swyke14歲。他於大約1529年與Elizabeth Huddlestone在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1584年6月25日在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Belgrave于1508年5月15日出生在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德时，他的父亲John Belgrave19岁，母亲Johanna Swyke14岁。他于大约1529年与Elizabeth Huddlestone在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1584年6月25日在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Belgrave was born on 15 May 1508, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, his father, John Belgrave, was 19 and his mother, Johanna Swyke, was 14. He married Elizabeth Huddlestone about 1529, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 June 1584, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Belgrave est né le 15 mai 1508, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Belgrave, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Johanna Swyke, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Huddlestone environ 1529, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1584, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Belgrave am 15. Mai 1508 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Belgrave 19 und seine Mutter Johanna Swyke 14. Er hat um 1529 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Huddlestone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1584 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Belgrave è nato il il 15 maggio 1508 nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Belgrave, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Swyke, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Huddlestone circa 1529, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1584, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Belgrave(이)가 1508년 5월 15일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Belgrave(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Swyke(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Elizabeth Huddlestone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1584년 6월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15 May 1508–25 June 1584: 15 de maio de 1508–25 de junho de 1584
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Belgrave nasceu em 15 de maio de 1508, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Belgrave, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Swyke, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Huddlestone aproximadamente 1529, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1584, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Belgrave родился 15 мая 1508 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Belgrave было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Swyke, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Huddlestone около 1529 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 июня 1584 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.15 May 1508–25 June 1584: 15 de mayo de 1508–25 de junio de 1584
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Belgrave nació el 15 de mayo de 1508, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Belgrave, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Johanna Swyke, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Huddlestone aproximadamente 1529, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1584, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
